name: Personio
tagline: AI-driven HR platform for European SMBs with full employee lifecycle coverage
description: Personio is an all-in-one HR platform built for small and mid-sized European businesses. Its AI features automate payroll preparation, absence management, document handling, and recruiting workflows. Personio covers the entire employee lifecycle from recruiting and onboarding through performance management and offboarding, with strong compliance for European labor laws and GDPR.
